description: MCP enforcement layer that intercepts AI agent actions and blocks rule violations before execution.
name: io.sunaivacore/gate

environmentVariables.description: Pro-tier API key for premium rules. Free tier (35 local rules: 27 constitutional + 8 recommended-default) needs no key.
environmentVariables.name: SUNAIVA_GATE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to evaluate without blocking — writes 'would_have_blocked' to audit log.
environmentVariables.name: SUNAIVA_GATE_DRY_RUN

environmentVariables.description: Emergency kill-switch: set to '1' to allow all actions unconditionally.
environmentVariables.name: DISABLE_SUNAIVA_GATE

title: Sunaiva Gate — Agent Rule Enforcement
